title: Dense Smoked Croatian Haddock Pilaf
description: A hearty, flavorful Croatian dish featuring smoked haddock, mustard, and fragrant herbs.
instructions: Rinse the smoked haddock fillets under cold running water, pat them dry with paper towels, and set aside.
In a mortar and pestle, pound the mustard until smooth.
In a large saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth and white wine, stirring to combine.
Add the smoked haddock fillets and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the chopped parsley and cook for 1 minute more.
Stir in the pounded mustard and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
